mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_favorites (user_id, artifact_id, group_name, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{artifactId}, #{groupName}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND artifact_id = #{artifactId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND artifact_id = #{artifactId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId}
AND group_name = #{groupName}
